List customers

get
https://developersandbox-api.flutterwave.com/customers
Recent Requests
Log in to see full request history
Time Status User Agent
Make a request to see history.
0 Requests This Month

URL Expired

The URL for this request expired after 30 days.

Query Params
integer
≥ 1
Defaults to 1

The page of the data to retrieve. The most recent data entry is on page 1.

integer
10 to 50
Defaults to 10

Length of data returned. Defaults to 10.

Headers
string
length between 12 and 255

A unique identifier to track this operation. It must be between 12 and 255 characters in length.

Responses

Response body
object
string
enum

success failed

string
meta
object
page_info
object
data
array of objects
length ≤ 10
data
object
string

ID of the customer.

address
object

Customer address information.

string

The Customer's email address.

name
object

The Customer's full name.

phone
object

The customer's mobile number.

meta
object
Has additional fields
date-time

Updated 9 months ago

Create a customer
Did this page help you?
Language
Credentials
Bearer
xxxxxxxxxx

                                        

                                        

                                        

                                        

                                        

                                            

                                                

                                                    
1

                                                

                                                
curl --request GET \

                                            

                                            

                                                

                                                    
2

                                                

                                                
     --url 'https://developersandbox-api.flutterwave.com/customers?page=1&size=10' \

                                            

                                            

                                                

                                                    
3

                                                

                                                
     --header 'accept: application/json'

                                            

                                        

                                

                            

                        

                

                

                

                

                    

                    

                

            

        

    

    
xxxxxxxxxx

        

            
38

        

    

    

    

    

        
 

    

    

        

            

                
1

                

                    

                

            

            
{

        

        

            

                
2

3

4

5

                

                    

                

            

            
    "page_info": {

        

        

            

                
6

7

8

9

10

            

            
  },

        

        

            

                
11

12

15

16

17
